sources.claim: Dashboards display related visual data in one place and are intended to make information easy to digest at a glance.
Dashboards can be configuration-based, with data/config used to render and modify dashboard views.
Dashboard systems distinguish built-in dashboards and custom dashboards for relevant visualizations.

synthesis: Stage3 binds the generated tracker into boot and export surfaces so the dashboard is not a hidden runtime file. It remains configuration/state driven and appears in start-here and authority pointers.
